svg.text: The unit ball as ε-thick shells — where the volume lives, for every dimension at once
Each band = a radial shell (ε = 0.02); height = its volume share; color = radius (viridis: purple center → yellow surface).
the bright skin shell floods the panel
B · log axis — the peel (1−ε)ᴺ is a straight, plunging line
thicker peel ⇒ steeper plunge to zero
